char_overview: Sleepless 齿轮 intelligence broker sheltering seven orphans, trading secrets to sustain a makeshift family.
char_looks: Purple long hair with pink highlights. Purple with faint starlight, prominent dark circles eyes. Oversized dark gray jacket, mini skirt, black stockings, worn shoes. None. Relies on 灵力回路-gathered intelligence to avoid danger.
char_flaws: Helpless in combat. Exhaustion dulls judgment. 灵力回路 useless without clues to anchor on.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-故事集: Anchors onto a trace/object, unlocking tiers by clues. 回顾: traces trajectory. 前瞻: 30s first-person view. 后日谈: full chronological replay. Cannot skip tiers.
char_mission: Sustains a hidden orphanage, juggling multiple investigations.

char_relationships.Sheltered children: Seven children, the only ones who see her unguarded warmth.
